mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pur_order (order_no, supplier_id, supplier_name, warehouse_id, warehouse_name, total_amount, tax_amount, final_amount, order_date, expected_date, status, remark, created_by, created_at, version) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{warehouseId}, #{warehouseName}, #{totalAmount}, #{taxAmount}, #{finalAmount}, #{orderDate}, #{expectedDate}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createdBy}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE pur_order SET supplier_id = #{supplierId}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, warehouse_id = #{warehouseId}, warehouse_name = #{warehouseName}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, tax_amount = #{taxAmount}, final_amount = #{finalAmount}, expected_date = #{expectedDate}, remark = #{remark}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE pur_order SET status = #{status}, approved_by = #{approvedBy}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
